title: SQL: relaxing subqueries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, age INTEGER CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO users VALUES ((SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM users), 'Charlie', NULL);
INSERT INTO users VALUES ((SELECT COALESCE(MAX(age), 0) + 1 FROM users), 'David', 35);
key_bug_features: subquery in insert statement with max function
